experience.description: Spearheading the development of intuitive, self-service features on a cloud-based, analytics-driven advertising platform for Walmart's sponsored search. Led Pendo platform integration, automating UI development, yielding data-driven user insights and saving 81% of engineering effort. Responsible for implementing algorithmic bidding strategies for campaign management estimated with $70M revenue impact. Developing personalized recommendations for successful advertiser campaign setup estimated with $50M revenue impact. Spearheaded redesign, development & launch of optimization pages, reducing campaign & keyword optimization efforts by 70%. Led development & launch of sponsored brands resulting in access to premium search placement with $9M revenue impact. Led redesign and development of campaign builder page resulting in enhanced user experience and reduction of >30% clicks. Developed & launched bulk operations leading to efficient optimization of multiple campaigns through 99.66% reduction in clicks. Led the 'Out of Budget' platform feature recognized as Best Team Launch for Q3 2024.

Strategic business and product development leading customization of cloud and analytics based solutions and services for enterprises. Responsible for 'Asset Management' & 'AR/VR' product roadmaps in field services, new feature prioritization for strategic accounts. Customized solutions securing partnerships with hi-tech firms for large-scale managed service implementations. Led consultation and definition of tank level monitoring use cases in remote locations. Designed customization & implementation of track & trace solutions. Exceeded revenue target of $24M and was top performer in IoT business development FY19-20 for strategic hi-tech accounts.

Led cloud and analytics product management internally and with partners. Led roadmap definition along with cloud partners from ideation to execution for 'Worker Safety' and 'Asset Track & Trace' products. Responsible for IoT solution development with partners resulting in $400K partner investment & joint GTM. Led data-driven immersive store experience & field services use case development at the edge. Awarded Excellence in 'Customer Insights' for IoT product roadmap & strategy; O-Infinity award for Outstanding Performance. Exceeded revenue target expectations in FY19, achieving $8M+ from cloud-based IoT solutions and services.

Founding member of IoT taskforce. Program managed the Conception and Launch of IoT Business Unit in HCL globally. Responsible for development of MVP on field services for a leading industrial manufacturer resulting in $90+ Million booking. Led product roadmap for 'Platform Acceleration Suite' resulting in faster development & launch of cloud applications by 40%. Led product definition for 'Product Intelligence', 'Aegis Gateway' & 'Pangea Analytics Framework'. Appreciated with Business Catalyst of the Year award at 2014 Sales Meet — Eagles Nest for product management in IoT.

Developed HCL's IoT product line's GTM strategy including market research, business case, target verticals, roadmap & marketing plan. Designed and developed pricing models for ten service lines of HCL using cost and benefits-based pricing.

Responsible for complete content management module for offshore/onsite teams in a €400,000 portal development project. Analyzed customer requirements, core development team of web portal application, reduced defects by 25%.

education.degree: Science of Storytelling: A Powerful Business Tool
education.description: Executive course on leveraging storytelling for business communication and product strategy.

education.degree: Product Management for the Internet of Things
education.description: Specialized course on IoT product management strategies, frameworks, and go-to-market approaches.
One of the world's premier business schools. Focused on strategy, product management, and technology-driven business development.

Undergraduate studies in Information Science and Engineering. Conducted groundbreaking IoT research in collaboration with ERNET India and the Indian Institute of Science (IISc) — contributing to India's national IoT policy formation.

projects.title: Self-Serve Advertising Platform — Walmart Connect
projects.description: Leading the development of cloud-based, self-service advertising features including campaign builder, optimization pages, bulk operations, and personalized recommendations for Walmart's sponsored search platform. Estimated $120M+ combined revenue impact.

projects.title: Algorithmic Bidding & Personalized Recommendations
projects.description: Implementing algorithmic bidding strategies ($70M impact) and AI-powered personalized campaign recommendations ($50M impact) to enable advertisers to optimize performance with data-driven insights.

projects.title: Sponsored Brands Launch
projects.description: Led development and launch of Sponsored Brands, providing advertisers access to premium search placements on Walmart.com with $9M revenue impact and enhanced brand visibility.

projects.title: IoT Business Unit (IoT WoRKS) — HCL
projects.description: Founding member of the IoT Business Unit incubated within the CEO's office. Program managed conception, launch, and scaling of IoT products across field services, asset management, and industrial manufacturing. Drove $90M+ in bookings.

projects.title: Worker Safety & Asset Track & Trace Products
projects.description: Led roadmap definition with cloud partners (Azure, GCP) from ideation to execution for enterprise IoT solutions including worker safety monitoring and asset tracking with $400K partner investment.

projects.title: 6LoWPAN IoT Framework — National Impact Research
projects.description: Undergraduate research developing a 6LoWPAN-based wireless framework for soil monitoring in agriculture in collaboration with ERNET India and IISc. Contributed to India's national IoT policy, BIS standards, and the Indo-German WASCA initiative.
